page.title: Template:Country data Fifth Republic of Korea

revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Fifth Republic of Korea | shortname alias = South Korea | flag alias = Flag of South Korea (1984–1997).svg | flag alias-1981 = Flag of South Korea (1949–1984).svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Republic of Korea Army.svg | link alias-army = Republic of Korea Army | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of Korea Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of Korea Air Force | flag alias-naval = Flag of the Republic of Korea Navy.svg | link alias-naval = Republic of Korea Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of Korea Marine Corps.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of Korea Marine Corps | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Republic of Korea Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of Korea Navy | flag alias-military = Flag of the Republic of Korea Armed Forces.svg | link alias-military = Republic of Korea Armed Forces | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1981 | redir1 = Fifth Republic of South Korea | related1 = South Korea | related2 = First Republic of Korea | related3 = Second Republic of Korea | related4 = Supreme Council for National Reconstruction | related5 = Third Republic of Korea | related6 = Fourth Republic of Korea | related7 = Korean Empire | related8 = North Korea | related9 = Joseon | related10 = Korea | related11 = Korea under Japanese rule </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Fifth_Republic_of_Korea here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = Fifth Republic of Korea | shortname alias = South Korea | flag alias = Flag of South Korea (1984–1997).svg | flag alias-1981 = Flag of South Korea (1949–1984).svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Republic of Korea Army.svg | link alias-army = Republic of Korea Army | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of Korea Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of Korea Air Force | flag alias-naval = Flag of the Republic of Korea Navy.svg | link alias-naval = Republic of Korea Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of Korea Marine Corps.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of Korea Marine Corps | flag alias-navy = Flag of the Republic of Korea Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of Korea Navy | flag alias-military = Flag of the Republic of Korea Armed Forces.svg | link alias-military = Republic of Korea Armed Forces | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1981 | redir1 = Fifth Republic of South Korea | related1 = South Korea | related2 = First Republic of Korea | related3 = Second Republic of Korea | related4 = Supreme Council for National Reconstruction | related5 = Third Republic of Korea | related6 = Fourth Republic of Korea | related7 = Korean Empire | related8 = North Korea | related9 = Joseon | related10 = Korea | related11 = Korea under Japanese rule </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
